features.title: Audio Driver Init
features.description: Initialize kernel audio subsystem during boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动阶段初始化内核音频子系统。

features.title: PS/2 Mouse Input
features.description: Initialize kernel PS/2 mouse input subsystem.
features.description_zh: 初始化内核 PS/2 鼠标输入子系统。

features.title: TTY2 Desktop
features.description: Enable desktop compositor tick/update path on TTY2.
features.description_zh: 在 TTY2 启用桌面合成器 tick/更新路径。

features.title: WM Multi-Rect Damage
features.description: Track several dirty rectangles instead of collapsing every frame into one large region.
features.description_zh: 跟踪多个脏矩形，避免每帧都合并成一个大区域。

features.title: WM Scene Layer Cache
features.description: Keep a cached scene layer so unchanged background/window pixels do not need full redraw.
features.description_zh: 保留场景层缓存，避免未变化的背景/窗口像素重复重绘。

features.title: WM Frame Pacing
features.description: Limit compositor flush rate using timer/TSC pacing to reduce tearing and jitter.
features.description_zh: 使用 timer/TSC 控制合成器刷新率，减少撕裂和抖动。

features.title: WM FPS/MS Overlay
features.description: Draw the compositor FPS/MS box in the bottom-right corner.
features.description_zh: 在右下角绘制合成器 FPS/MS 统计框。

features.title: WM Input Dispatch
features.description: Dispatch mouse and keyboard events to focused kernel windows.
features.description_zh: 将鼠标和键盘事件分发给获得焦点的内核窗口。

features.title: WM Dead Owner Cleanup
features.description: Automatically destroy windows owned by exited processes.
features.description_zh: 自动销毁已退出进程拥有的窗口。

features.title: Driver Manager
features.description: Initialize kernel ELF driver manager.
features.description_zh: 初始化内核 ELF 驱动管理器。

features.title: KELF Executor
features.description: Enable kernel ELF app dispatcher and kelfd task.
features.description_zh: 启用内核 ELF 应用分发器和 kelfd 任务。

features.title: Auto Enter User Shell
features.description: Auto-exec /shell/shell.elf after kernel boot.
features.description_zh: 内核启动后自动执行 /shell/shell.elf。

features.title: Heap Selftest
features.description: Run kmalloc/kfree selftest during kernel boot.
features.description_zh: 在内核启动期间运行 kmalloc/kfree 自检。

features.title: Load External PSF Font
features.title_zh: 加载外部 PSF 字体
features.description: Load /system/tty.psf and apply it to framebuffer TTY.
features.description_zh: 加载 /system/tty.psf 并应用到 framebuffer TTY。

features.title: PS/2 Keyboard Input
features.description: Initialize PS/2 keyboard input subsystem.
features.description_zh: 初始化 PS/2 键盘输入子系统。

features.title: ELFRUNNER Probe
features.description: Probe kernel ELF runtime metadata after ELFRUNNER init.
features.description_zh: 在 ELFRUNNER 初始化后探测内核 ELF 运行时元数据。

features.title: Scheduler Task: klogd
features.description: Enable periodic klogd maintenance task.
features.description_zh: 启用周期性 klogd 维护任务。

features.title: Scheduler Task: kworker
features.description: Enable periodic kernel worker service-heartbeat task.
features.description_zh: 启用周期性内核 worker 服务心跳任务。

features.title: Scheduler Task: usrd
features.description: Enable user/runtime dispatch task (shell tick, tty tick, exec tick).
features.description_zh: 启用用户/运行时分发任务（shell tick、tty tick、exec tick）。

features.title: Boot Video Geometry Logs
features.description: Print framebuffer width/height/pitch/bpp logs at boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动时打印 framebuffer 宽/高/pitch/bpp 日志。

features.title: PMM Stats Logs
features.description: Print PMM managed/free/used/dropped pages at boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动时打印 PMM 托管/空闲/已用/丢弃页数。

features.title: Heap Stats Logs
features.description: Print heap total/free bytes at boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动时打印堆总字节/空闲字节。

features.title: FS Root Children Log
features.description: Print root directory children count during FS init.
features.description_zh: 在文件系统初始化时打印根目录子项数量。

features.title: FS /SYSTEM Sanity Check
features.description: Require /system directory check during boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动时要求通过 /system 目录检查。

features.title: ELFRUNNER Init
features.description: Initialize ELFRUNNER framework in kernel boot path.
features.description_zh: 在内核启动路径中初始化 ELFRUNNER 框架。

features.title: SYSCALL Tick Query
features.description: Query timer ticks via syscall and log result during boot.
features.description_zh: 在启动时通过 syscall 查询定时器 tick 并记录日志。

features.title: TTY Ready Logs
features.description: Print TTY count/active/cursor ready logs.
features.description_zh: 打印 TTY 数量/活动终端/光标就绪日志。

features.title: Idle Loop Debug Log
features.description: Print debug log before entering kernel idle loop.
features.description_zh: 进入内核空闲循环前打印调试日志。

features.title: Virtual /proc
features.description: Enable virtual procfs paths (/proc, /proc/list, /proc/self, /proc/<pid>) in syscall FS layer.
features.description_zh: 在 syscall 文件系统层启用虚拟 procfs 路径（/proc、/proc/list、/proc/self、/proc/<pid>）。

features.title: EXEC Serial Logs
features.description: Print EXEC run/return/path logs to serial output.
features.description_zh: 将 EXEC run/return/path 日志输出到串口。

features.title: EXEC Context Switch Logs
features.description: Print cooperative EXEC suspend/resume logs such as EXEC RUN RESUME and RUN SUSPENDED.
features.description_zh: 输出协作式 EXEC 挂起/恢复日志，例如 EXEC RUN RESUME 和 RUN SUSPENDED。

features.title: Network DHCP Client
features.description: Use DHCP to auto-configure IPv4/netmask/gateway/DNS; disable to use fallback QEMU-style static config.
features.description_zh: 使用 DHCP 自动配置 IPv4/掩码/网关/DNS；关闭后使用 QEMU 风格 fallback 静态配置。

features.title: SYSCALL Serial Logs
features.description: Print user syscall CALL/RET trace logs to serial output.
features.description_zh: 将用户态 syscall 的 CALL/RET 跟踪日志输出到串口。

features.title: SYSCALL USER_ID Serial Logs
features.description: Print USER_TRACE_BEGIN/END, PID, and USER_ID trace logs to serial output.
features.description_zh: 将 USER_TRACE_BEGIN/END、PID 与 USER_ID 跟踪日志输出到串口。

features.title: Kernel Log Level: DEBUG
features.description: Allow CLKS_LOG_DEBUG messages to be emitted by clks_log/clks_log_hex.
features.description_zh: 允许 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出 CLKS_LOG_DEBUG 消息。

features.title: Kernel Log Level: INFO
features.description: Allow CLKS_LOG_INFO messages to be emitted by clks_log/clks_log_hex.
features.description_zh: 允许 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出 CLKS_LOG_INFO 消息。

features.title: Kernel Log Level: WARN
features.description: Allow CLKS_LOG_WARN messages to be emitted by clks_log/clks_log_hex.
features.description_zh: 允许 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出 CLKS_LOG_WARN 消息。

features.title: Kernel Log Level: ERROR
features.description: Allow CLKS_LOG_ERROR messages to be emitted by clks_log/clks_log_hex.
features.description_zh: 允许 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出 CLKS_LOG_ERROR 消息。

features.title: Kernel Log Output: Serial
features.description: Send clks_log/clks_log_hex output to serial port.
features.description_zh: 将 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出发送到串口。

features.title: Kernel Log Output: TTY
features.description: Render clks_log/clks_log_hex output to TTY with ANSI colors.
features.description_zh: 将 clks_log/clks_log_hex 输出渲染到 TTY（含 ANSI 颜色）。

features.title: Kernel Log Output: Journal
features.title_zh: 内核日志输出：日志缓冲
features.description: Store clks_log/clks_log_hex lines into in-memory log journal for dmesg/procfs reads.
features.description_zh: 将 clks_log/clks_log_hex 行写入内存日志缓冲，供 dmesg/procfs 读取。

features.title: UserSafeController (USC)
features.description: Prompt before dangerous user syscalls and remember per-app approval for current boot.
features.description_zh: 在危险用户态 syscall 执行前弹出确认，并在本次启动期间按应用记住授权。

features.title: Intercept FS_MKDIR
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_MKDIR.
features.description_zh: USC 对 FS_MKDIR syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept FS_WRITE
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_WRITE.
features.description_zh: USC 对 FS_WRITE syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept FS_APPEND
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_APPEND.
features.description_zh: USC 对 FS_APPEND syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept FS_REMOVE
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_REMOVE.
features.description_zh: USC 对 FS_REMOVE syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATH
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATH.
features.description_zh: USC 对 EXEC_PATH syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATHV
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATHV.
features.description_zh: USC 对 EXEC_PATHV syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATHV_IO
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATHV_IO.
features.description_zh: USC 对 EXEC_PATHV_IO syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept SPAWN_PATH
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SPAWN_PATH.
features.description_zh: USC 对 SPAWN_PATH syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept SPAWN_PATHV
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SPAWN_PATHV.
features.description_zh: USC 对 SPAWN_PATHV syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept PROC_KILL
features.description: USC prompt for syscall PROC_KILL.
features.description_zh: USC 对 PROC_KILL syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept SHUTDOWN
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SHUTDOWN.
features.description_zh: USC 对 SHUTDOWN syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Intercept RESTART
features.description: USC prompt for syscall RESTART.
features.description_zh: USC 对 RESTART syscall 弹出确认。

features.title: Keyboard TTY Switch Hotkey
features.title_zh: 键盘 TTY 切换热键
features.description: Enable ALT+F1..F4 keyboard hotkey for active TTY switching.
features.description_zh: 启用 ALT+F1..F4 热键切换当前活动 TTY。

features.title: Keyboard Ctrl Shortcuts
features.description: Enable Ctrl+A/C/V shortcuts for input selection/copy/paste.
features.description_zh: 启用 Ctrl+A/C/V 输入区全选/复制/粘贴快捷键。

features.title: Keyboard Force-Stop Hotkey
features.description: Enable Ctrl+Alt+C force-stop for current running user process.
features.description_zh: 启用 Ctrl+Alt+C 强制停止当前运行的用户进程。

features.title: User Init Script Probe
features.description: Probe and log /shell/init.cmd presence during userland init.
features.description_zh: 在用户态初始化期间探测并记录 /shell/init.cmd 是否存在。

features.title: User System App Probe
features.description: Probe /system/elfrunner.elf and /system/memc.elf during userland init.
features.description_zh: 在用户态初始化期间探测 /system/elfrunner.elf 与 /system/memc.elf。

features.title: Scheduler Task Count Log
features.description: Print scheduler task count after scheduler initialization.
features.description_zh: 在调度器初始化后打印任务数量。

features.title: Interrupt Ready Log
features.description: Print IDT/PIC initialized log after interrupt setup.
features.description_zh: 在完成中断初始化后打印 IDT/PIC 就绪日志。

features.title: Shell Mode Log
features.description: Print whether boot default mode is user shell or kernel shell.
features.description_zh: 打印默认启动模式是用户 Shell 还是内核 Shell。
